data.chapter_title_en: What to say when leaving the home
data.arabic_text: (بِسْمِ اللَّهِ، تَوَكَّلْتُ عَلَى اللَّهِ، وَلَاَ حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِاللَّهِ).
data.english_text: (In the name of Allah, I place my trust in Allah, and there is no might nor power except with Allah.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Bismil-lah, tawakkaltu AAalal-lah, wala hawla wala quwwata illa billah.)
